title: Amtech G4515 Heavy Duty Wood Scraper, 4-Edge Scraper with Comfort Grip Handle, 2.5” Scraper Head can be Re-Sharpened
features: The Amtech G4515 Wood Scraper is ideal for the rapid preparation of wooden painted surfaces and benefits from a hardened carbon steel blade.
This 4-way 2.5-inch scraper head can also be re-sharpened, as and when required.
Features a comfort grip for ergonomic handling and for ease of use.
Compatible with the Amtech G4518 2.5inch (6.5cm) Wood Scraper Blade Set
Note: Please handle with care when using or changing sharp blades and kindly store in a safe place, to keep away from children. Not for sale to people under the age of 18 years.
description: Product Description The Amtech G4515 4-Edge Heavy Duty Wood Scraper features a 2.5 inch hardened carbon steel blade. The lightweight and durable construction also benefits from a comfort grip handle and it is also very easy to clean. Alongside scraping tasks, you can also use this hand tool for removing loose putty and vinyl, as well as, patching dents and addressing wall cracks. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
